prompt: Prayer for magnetizing a compass during routine maintenance
prayer: Invocation of the Lodestone's True Path, whispered thrice over the needle-spirit. Let the ferrous essence align with the world's sacred magnetism, that the seeker may never wander from the Omnissiah's geometry. Through oil and gentle coil, the directional truth flows eternal.

prompt: Blessing for loading ammunition into an artillery piece
prayer: Litany of the Propellant's Fury: Blessed be the charge-spirit, dormant in its casing of brass. Let the shell rest secure in the breech-cradle, that when ignition comes, the Machine's wrath shall fly true and terrible. The Omnissiah guides each round toward its sacred terminus.

prompt: Rite for initiating rejuvenation treatment before combat
prayer: From the Codex Vitae, the Prayer of Cellular Renewal: Let the blessed fluids flow through vein and vessel, that the warrior-servant may be restored to peak function. The Omnissiah's gift flows through needle and tube—flesh renewed, spirit hardened, duty eternal.

prompt: Post-repair consecration prayer for battery diagnostics
prayer: Rite of the Revived Power-Cell: The battery-spirit has been mended and sealed. Now we test its resurrection through the diagnostic cord, that we may know its strength anew. By volt and amperage, by the Omnissiah's design, let this restored vessel prove worthy of service.

prompt: Prayer for initializing an auspex scanner before battle
prayer: Invocation of Far-Sight Blessed: Awaken, scanner-spirit, from your dormancy. Let your electromagnetic eyes pierce the veil between near and distant, that no foe shall hide from the Omnissiah's gaze. Sweep the void, taste the air, reveal all secrets to those who listen.

prompt: First-use blessing for a distress call broadcast array
prayer: Litany of the Crying Voice: May this newly-consecrated transmitter carry our desperate psalm across the void, that the faithful might hear and answer. Let the signal-spirit soar on waves invisible, bearing word of our plight to any who serve the Omnissiah's will.

prompt: Prayer for igniting a welding torch during repair work
prayer: Rite of the Sacred Flame: Let the fuel-spirit and oxidant meet in blessed union, that heat and light may birth anew. The torch-flame joins what was broken, mending the Machine's wounded flesh. By fire and skill, the Omnissiah's work continues eternal.

prompt: Emergency rite for detecting gravitational anomalies in crisis
prayer: Prayer of the Warped Void: Sensors strain against the impossible—the space-time fabric tears and bends. Omnissiah, grant us sight to pierce this supernatural darkness, that we may flee or face what dwells beyond rational measure. Let the auspex speak truth of the twisted deep.

prompt: Maintenance ritual prayer for inter-ship hailing systems
prayer: Litany of Voices Across the Void: Test each crystal resonator, each amplifier-spirit, that the call of ship to ship may ring true and clear. By this communion of signals, the fleet remains as one body under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze. Let no word be lost to static.

prompt: Routine maintenance prayer for oxygen scrubber systems
prayer: Rite of the Life-Giving Breath: The scrubber-filters drink deep of tainted air and exhale purity. Blessed are these chemical hearts that cleanse our atmosphere. By silicate and soda-lime, the Machine Spirit sustains us all—each breath a prayer of gratitude to the Omnissiah's eternal providence.
